name: AI_AddPrefab
paramRaw: PlayerID player, String name, String behaviourName, Real radius, Integer minDifficulty, Integer maxDifficulty, Boolean canReassign, Boolean active
description: Adds a prefab to the AIPrefab system. Target must be set up in a follow up call with returned ID

name: AI_ConvertToSimPlayer
description: Converts an AIPlayer into a Player

name: AI_Enable
description: Enables or Disables an AI player

name: AI_GetDifficulty
description: Gets the difficulty level of this AI player

name: AI_GetPersonality
description: Get the personality name of this AI player

name: AI_IsEnabled
description: Returns true if player is a AIPlayer and is enabled

name: AI_SetDifficulty
description: Set the difficulty level of this AI player

name: AI_SetPersonality
description: Set the personality name of this AI player

name: AI_SetPrefabCanReassign
paramRaw: UniqueID prefabId, PlayerID player, Boolean canReassign
description: Set the can_reassign state of an existing AIPrefab

name: AI_UnlockAll
description: Unlocks all designer locked squads for player

name: AIEncounter_TacticFilter_SetAbilityPriority
paramRaw: AIEncounterID pEncounter, PropertyBagGroup abilityPBG, Real priority
description: Set ability priority for all squads in encounter; negative priority disables

name: AIEncounter_TargetGuidance_SetSquadPatrolPathByName
paramRaw: AIEncounterID pEncounter, SquadID pSquad, String pathName, Real delaySecs, Boolean invertPathAtEnd, Boolean startInverted
description: Sets target patrol path for the squad

name: AIEncounter_TargetGuidance_SetSquadPatrolWander
paramRaw: AIEncounterID pEncounter, SquadID pSquad, Real delaySecs, Integer radiusMode, Real radiusOverride, Boolean overrideCenter, Position centerOverride
description: Sets random wander target patrol for the squad; delaySecs is the time in secs to pause at each random point

name: AIPlayer_CachedPathCrossesEnemyTerritory
paramRaw: PlayerID aiPlayer, Integer requestingID, Real minDistToEnemyTerritory, Boolean unused
description: Checks if the cached path crosses known enemy territory

name: AIPlayer_UpdateSkirmishScoutingTasks
description: Requests the skirmish AI to update scout encounters

name: BP_GetAIFormationTargetPriorityBlueprint
description: Returns an AIFormationTargetPriority property bag group.

name: BP_GetEntityBlueprint
description: Returns an entity property bag group.

name: BP_GetName
description: Return the short name of the group

name: BP_GetSquadBlueprint
description: Returns a squad property bag group.

name: BP_GetUpgradeBlueprint
description: Returns an upgrade property bag group.

name: Camera_QueueRelativeSplinePanPos
description: Queue a spline control point by position relative to the last queued position. Pan is deferred until requested by an execution function

name: Camera_SetInputEnabled
description: Enables/disables camera input.

name: EGroup_SortBasedOnHealth
description: Sorts the EGroup based on health

name: Entity_CanAttackNow
description: Returns whether an entity can attack a target without moving or turning.

name: Entity_ConvertBlueprint
description: Converts Entity's blueprint to the specified blueprint.

name: Entity_Create
paramRaw: ScarEntityPBG ebp, PlayerID player, Position pos, Boolean snapToTerrain
description: Creates an entity at a given position and assigns it to a given player. This function does not spawn the entity so you will need to call Entity_Spawn to see this entity

name: Entity_DeSpawn
description: DeSpawn the entity at its current position

name: Entity_Destroy
description: Remove an entity from the world and destroy it.

name: Entity_GetBlueprint
description: Returns the entity's blueprint

name: Entity_GetHeading
description: Returns the heading of the entity.  The heading is currently a lua table with three entries (x, y, z)

name: Entity_GetHealth
description: Returns the health of an entity.

name: Entity_GetHealthMax
description: Returns the max health of an entity.

name: Entity_GetHealthPercentage
description: Returns the percentage health, taking into account destructible buildings

name: Entity_GetMaxHoldSquadSlots
description: Returns the number of specified slots for squads in a hold in the HoldExtInfo

name: Entity_GetPlayerOwner
description: Returns the Player owner of the given entity. Entity MUST NOT be owned by the world.

name: Entity_GetPosition
description: Returns the position of the entity.  The position is currently a lua table with three entries (x, y, z)

name: Entity_GetSquad
description: Returns the Squad for the passed Entity. (May be nullptr)

name: Entity_HasAbility
description: Tests to see if an entity has an ability

name: Entity_IsAlive
description: Returns true if entity is still alive

name: Entity_IsBuilding
description: Returns true if the given entity is a building

name: Entity_IsBurnable
description: Returns true if the entity can be set on fire

name: Entity_IsInvulnerable
description: get if an entity is invulnerable

name: Entity_IsOfType
description: Determines if this entity is of the given type. Types are defined in type_ext/unit_type_list

name: Entity_IsPartOfSquad
description: Returns true if the entity is part of a squad

name: Entity_IsStrategicPoint
description: Returns true if the entity is a strategic point.

name: Entity_IsStrategicPointCapturedBy
description: Returns true if strategic point is captured by the team of the player provided.

name: Entity_Kill
description: Kill the entity.  Sets health to 0, and triggers death effects.

name: Entity_SetAnimatorEvent
description: Set animation event for an entity. Please only use this for simple animations

name: Entity_SetAnimatorState
paramRaw: EntityID pEntity, String stateMachineName, String stateName
description: Set animation state of a state machine for an entity. Please only use this for simple animations

name: Entity_SetHeading
paramRaw: EntityID entity, Position pos, Boolean bInterpolate
description: Sets the heading of the entity.  The position is currently a lua table with three entries (x, y, z)

name: Entity_SetHealth
description: Set the health of an entity.  healthPercent must be in the range [0.0, 1.0].

name: Entity_SnapToGridAndGround
description: Snaps the entity to the grid and ground.

name: Entity_Spawn
description: Spawn the entity at its current position

name: Event_GroupLeftAlive
paramRaw: Function callback, Table data, EGroupID / SGroup group, Integer amount, Real delay
description: Callback given callback function with data, when the amount of entities left in a group drops below amount.

name: FOW_RevealAll
description: Reveal FOW for all players

name: FOW_RevealArea
paramRaw: Position pos, Real radius, Real durationSecs
description: Reveals a circular area for all alive players over a given duration.

name: Game_GetLocalPlayer
description: Get the local player. (should only be used for UI purpose) (not deterministic)

name: Game_GetSPDifficulty
description: Returns current single player difficulty. It returns the current difficulty setting value based on the match type. (defined in root\sysconfig.lua) For campaign, it returns the current value of "CampaignDifficulty" setting. For rogue mode, it returns the current value of ""RogueModeDifficulty"" setting.

name: Game_SetVisibility
description: Sets the visibility of the specified game visibility flag.

name: Marker_Exists
description: Returns true if marker exists. If you don't care about the type, pass in an empty string ( "" )

name: Marker_GetDirection
description: Returns a vector for the marker direction

name: Marker_GetPosition
description: Returns the position of a given marker.

name: Marker_GetProximityRadiusOrDefault
description: Returns the proximity radius of a given marker.  If non circular, default value is returned This value gets set in the Scenario Editor.

name: Misc_AbortToFE
description: Abort straight out of the game to the frontend, without asking the user

name: Misc_GetMouseOverSquad
description: Returns the entity squad under the mouse (if any) (not deterministic)

name: Misc_IsEntityOnScreen
description: Check if the squad is on screen currently (not deterministic)

name: Misc_IsSquadOnScreen
description: Check if the entity is on screen currently (not deterministic)

name: Player_CanConstruct
description: Tests if the player is able to construct a given blueprint

name: Player_CanSeeEntity
description: Returns true if a player can see a given entity (revealed in FOW)

name: Player_CanSeeSquad
paramRaw: PlayerID player, SquadID squad, Boolean all
description: Returns true if a player can see ALL or ANY units in a given squad (revealed in FOW)

name: Player_ClearPopCapOverride
description: Clears the pop cap override so that modifiers can take effect again

name: Player_CompleteUpgrade
description: Finish upgrade for a player

name: Player_FromId
description: Returns a player given a player id from the ME.

name: Player_GetDisplayName
description: Returns the players UI name.

name: Player_GetEntities
description: Returns an sim::EntityGroupObs containing all the players entities excluding ones in squad.

name: Player_GetEntityCount
description: Returns the number of entities a player currently owns

name: Player_GetID
description: Returns the id of the player

name: Player_GetRaceName
description: Returns the name of the race for a given player (always in english)

name: Player_GetRelationship
description: DEPRECATED, use Player_ObserveRelationship instead.

name: Player_GetResource
description: Returns the amount of resources a given player has.

name: Player_GetResourceRate
description: Returns the amount of resources a given player is getting per second.

name: Player_GetSquadCount
description: Returns the number of squads a player currently owns

name: Player_GetSquads
description: Returns a SquadGroupObs containing all the players units.

name: Player_GiftResource
paramRaw: Player& player, Integer type, Real amount
description: Set the gifted resource amount for a given player A positive resource amount means the player receives the resources A negative resource amount means the player sends the resources Ignores income cap and resource sharing.

name: Player_IsAlive
description: Returns true if player is still alive and false if player is dead.  Will error if playerIdx is an invalid index.

name: Player_IsHuman
description: Returns whether a player is human controlled (local or remote), not dead, and not replaced by an AI

name: Player_ObserveRelationship
description: Get the relationship that observer has to target.

name: Player_RemoveUpgrade
description: Removes an upgrade from a player

name: Player_ResetResource
description: Reset the resource amount for a given player to zero.

name: Player_SetPopCapOverride
description: Sets a pop cap override that ignores any modifiers.

name: Player_SetResource
paramRaw: Player& player, Integer type, Real amt
description: Set the resource amount for a given player.  Ignores income cap and resource sharing.

name: SGroup_Add
description: Adds an squadron to the end of a group if the group doesn't already have it.

name: SGroup_AddGroup
description: Same as EGroup_AddGroup.  Note: You cannot mix squad groups and entity groups.

name: SGroup_Clear
description: Removes all entities from a group.

name: SGroup_ContainsSquad
paramRaw: SGroupID group, Integer SquadID, Boolean includeDespawned
description: Returns true if SGroup contains a particular SquadID

name: SGroup_Count
description: Returns the total number of spawned and despawned squads in a group.

name: SGroup_CountSpawned
description: Returns the number of spawned squads in a group.

name: SGroup_Create
description: Returns a new squadron group with the given name.

name: SGroup_Destroy
description: Manually destroy a group that you don't need anymore.

name: SGroup_Exists
description: Returns true if the squad group with the given name exists

name: SGroup_FacePosition
description: Works like Squad_FacePosition.  All Squads will face the same direction, with the squad the closest to the center determining the direction.

name: SGroup_FromName
description: Find an squadron group with a given name.

name: SGroup_GetPosition
description: Returns the center position of a squad group.

name: SGroup_GetSpawnedSquadAt
description: Returns the spawned squad at a certain position in the group.

name: SGroup_GetSquadAt
description: Returns the squad at a certain position in the group.

name: SGroup_Intersection
description: Same as EGroup_Intersection. Note: You cannot mix squad groups and entity groups.

name: SGroup_Remove
description: Removes an squadron from a group.

name: Squad_AddAbility
description: Allows the squad to use this ability

name: Squad_AdjustAbilityCooldown
description: Advance ability cooldown

name: Squad_CanAttackEntity
paramRaw: SquadID attacker, EntityID target, Boolean checkFOW, Boolean checkVis
description: Check if squad can attack target

name: Squad_CancelProductionQueueItem
description: Cancels an item in a production queue.  Index 0 is the currently producing item.

name: Squad_CanTargetEntity
paramRaw: Squad& squad, Entity& target, Boolean checkFOW
description: Check if a squad can target and attack a given entity.

name: Squad_CanTargetSquad
paramRaw: Squad& squad, Squad& target, Boolean checkFOW
description: Check if a squad can target and attack at least one entity in the given target squad.

name: Squad_CompleteUpgrade
description: Instantly adds an upgrade to a given squad

name: Squad_CreateAndSpawnToward
paramRaw: ScarSquadPBG sbp, PlayerID player, Integer loadoutCount, Position pos, Position toward
description: Create a squad, spawn it and assign it to a player.

name: Squad_DeSpawn
description: Despawn the entire squad at its current position.

name: Squad_Destroy
description: Remove an squad from the world and destroy it.

name: Squad_EnableProductionQueue
description: Sets whether a squad can produce anything (including upgrades)

name: Squad_FacePosition
description: Set the rotation of all units in a squad to face the position.

name: Squad_FaceSquad
description: Get 2 squads to face each other. This function works on spawned squads only.

name: Squad_GetBlueprint
description: Returns the squad blueprint of the squad (from the attribute editor)

name: Squad_GetHeading
description: Returns the average heading of the spawned units in the squad. The heading is currently a lua table with three entries (x, y, z)

name: Squad_GetHealth
description: Returns the current health of a squad.

name: Squad_GetHealthMax
description: Returns the max health of the squad.

name: Squad_GetHealthPercentage
description: Returns how much of an original squad's health is left, accounting for deaths (ex: a squad of 3 riflemen would be at 50% health, since they started with 6 members) Note: This is the same percentage that the UI uses.

name: Squad_GetMinArmor
description: Returns the current minimum armor of a squad.

name: Squad_GetPlayerOwner
description: Returns the Player owner of the given squad. Squad MUST NOT be owned by the world.

name: Squad_GetPosition
description: Returns the average position of the spawned units in the squad. The position is currently a lua table with three entries (x, y, z)

name: Squad_GetProductionQueueItem
description: Returns the blueprint for a production queue item with index.

name: Squad_GetVeterancyRank
description: Get current squad veterancy rank.

name: Squad_HasAbility
description: Tests to see if a squad has an ability

name: Squad_HasTeamWeapon
description: Returns true if the given squad has a team weapon

name: Squad_HasUpgrade
description: Return true if the squad has purchased the specified upgrade.

name: Squad_IsAlive
description: Check if the squad is alive

name: Squad_IsAttacking
description: Returns true if any unit in the squad is attacking within the time

name: Squad_IsCapturing
description: Returns true if the squad is currently capturing.

name: Squad_IsIdle
description: Returns true if the squad is idling

name: Squad_IsInHoldEntity
description: Check if the squad is garrisoned in entity (building)

name: Squad_IsInHoldSquad
description: Check if the squad is loaded in squad (vehicle

name: Squad_IsMoving
description: Returns true if any unit in the squad is currently moving

name: Squad_IsOfType
description: Determines if this squad is of the given type. Types are defined in squad_type_ext/squad_type_list

name: Squad_IsReinforcing
description: Returns true if the squad is currently reinforcing.  This function will return false if the squad does not have a reinforce ext.

name: Squad_IsRetreating
description: Returns true if the squad is retreating

name: Squad_IsUnderAttack
description: Returns true if any unit in the squad is under attack within the time

name: Squad_IsUpgrading
description: Returns true if the squad is currently upgrading something specific.

name: Squad_Kill
description: Kill whole squad.  Sets health to 0, and triggers death effects.

name: Squad_NumUpgradeComplete
description: Returns the number of upgrades that this squad has.

name: Squad_RemoveAbility
description: Removes an ability that was previously added by Squad_AddAbility. You cannot remove static abilities (from AE: squad_ability_ext)

name: Squad_RemoveUpgrade
description: Removes an upgrade from a squad

name: Squad_SetHealth
description: Set the health of all units in a squad.  Health must be in range [0.0, 1.0]

name: Squad_SetInvulnerableMinCap
paramRaw: SquadID squad, Real minHealthPercentage, Real resetTime
description: Make a squad invulnerable to physical damage.

name: Squad_SetMoveType
description: Sets the squad's move type

name: Squad_SetWorldOwned
description: Makes a squad neutral

name: Squad_Spawn
paramRaw: SquadID squad, Position pos, String spawnType
description: Spawn the entire squad at a give  n position

name: Squad_Split
description: Split the squad into 2. The new squad size is specified by the number passed in

name: Squad_StopAbility
paramRaw: SquadID squad, ScarAbilityPBG ability, Boolean bIsEarlyExit
description: Abruptly stops an active ability

name: Squad_TryFindClosestFreePosition
description: Returns the closest free position to the target position for the squad

name: UI_CreateEventCueClickable
paramRaw: Integer customEventType, Real lifetime, Integer repeatCount, Real repeatTime, String title, String description, String dataTemplate, String iconPath, String soundPath, Integer red, Integer green, Integer blue, Integer alpha, EventCueVisibility visibility, LuaFunction function
description: Creates a custom event cue. The Lua function callback passed in takes an ID as an argument which can be used to clear the event cue with UI_ClearEventCueFromID.

name: UI_CreateTagForPosition

params.type: a scar position. Won't accept a position extremely close (std::numeric_limits<float>::min()) to the existing ones.

paramRaw: a scar position. Won't accept a position extremely close (std::numeric_limits<float>::min()) to the existing ones.
description: Create a position tag.

name: UI_DestroyTagForPosition

params.type: same of or extremely close (std::numeric_limits<float>::min()) to an existing position. If there are multiple candidates

paramRaw: same of or extremely close (std::numeric_limits<float>::min()) to an existing position. If there are multiple candidates, delete the closest.
description: Destroy a position tag

name: UI_EnableEntityDecorator
description: Enable or disable entity decorator. The default is decorator enabled.

name: UI_EnableSquadDecorator
description: Enable or disable the squad decorator. The default is decorator enabled.

name: UI_FlashAbilityButton
description: Flash an ability command button.  Pass the return value to UI_StopFlashing to stop flashing the button.

name: UI_FlashEntity
description: Flashes the entity using attributes from [tuning][ui]

name: UI_LetterboxFade
paramRaw: Real r, Real g, Real b, Real a, Real duration, Real aspectRatio, Boolean persistent
description: Fades the letterbox to a given RGBA colour over a number of seconds by a given aspect ratio.

name: UI_NewHUDFeature
paramRaw: HUDFeatureType newHUDFeature, String featureText, String featureIcon, Real duration
description: Brings up a message and arrow pointing to a HUD feature.

name: UI_ScreenFade
paramRaw: Real r, Real g, Real b, Real a, Real duration, Boolean persistent
description: Fades the screen to a given RGBA colour over a number of seconds. mouse input is blocked during the fade, and you can control whether the input keeps being blocked after the fade has ended (be careful!)

name: UI_SetForceShowSubtitles
description: Sets the game to force show subtitles even if the player has them turned off.

name: UI_SetMinimapTrueNorth
description: Sets the angle of True North for the minimap in degrees

name: UI_SetSkipNISCallback
description: Sets a callback firing when user try to skip the NIS

name: World_DistancePointToPoint
description: Get the distance between two points.

name: World_EndSP
description: Wins/loses a single team mission for the local teams, with given win reason

name: World_GetHeightAt
description: returns the height of ground at 2D pos x,y

name: World_GetNeutralEntitiesNearMarker
description: Find and add neutral entities near the marker to the egroup

name: World_GetPlayerAt
description: Returns the player at a given index, numbers start at one

name: World_GetPlayerCount
description: Return the total number of players in the world

name: World_KillPlayer
description: Kills the player with a reason.

name: World_OwnsEntity
description: Returns true if the squad is owned by the world

name: World_OwnsSquad
description: Returns true if the squad is owned by the world

name: World_Pos
paramRaw: Real x, Real y, Real z
description: Creates a new Position object.
